description: Recipe breaker test set for URAN Pharma solution engine. These cases are intentionally selected to break weak parsers, weak branch selection, ad logic, special dissolution logic, route policy, rendering, and validation.

cases.title: Target solution via concentrate must not be treated as ready concentrate volume
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Engines confuse target concentration with stock concentration and take 150 ml of concentrate instead of converting through required mass.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: Sol. Natrii bromidi 2% — 150 ml
Coffeini-natrii benzoatis 1,0
Glucosi 6,0
M.D.S. По 1 столовой ложке 3 раза в день

cases.title: Ready solution must stay liquid and reduce ad water
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Weak engines push ready solutions into solids or try to recompute them as dry substances.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: Sol. Furacilini 1:5000 50 ml
Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
M.D.S. Наружно

cases.title: Standard solution must stay liquid object
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Standard solutions often get recalculated as if they were dry substances.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: Liquoris Burovi 10 ml
Aquae purificatae ad 50 ml
M.D.S. Наружно

cases.title: Fixed water plus ad conflict
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Many systems silently double count water.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: Natrii bromidi 2,0
Aquae purificatae 100 ml
Aquae purificatae ad 200 ml
M.D.S. Внутрь

cases.title: Multiple ad conflict
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Two ad markers force contradictory target resolution.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
Aquae Menthae ad 100 ml
M.D.S. Внутрь

cases.title: Largest liquid must not override explicit ad
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Heuristics grab the biggest liquid as target and ignore explicit ad.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: Aquae Menthae 100 ml
T-ra Valerianae 5 ml
Aquae purificatae ad 120 ml
M.D.S. Внутрь

cases.title: Impossible liquid sum over target volume
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Some engines still calculate negative water.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: T-ra Valerianae 60 ml
Sirupi simplicis 50 ml
Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
M.D.S. Внутрь

cases.title: Dry branch below KVO threshold
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Weak engines apply KVO to every solid automatically.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: Natrii bromidi 2,0
Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
M.D.S. Внутрь

cases.title: Dry branch at or above KVO threshold
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Weak engines either never apply KVO or apply it to the wrong branch.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: Magnesii sulfatis 25,0
Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
M.D.S. Внутрь

cases.title: Concentrate path must not apply KVO even for big masses
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Engines see a large mass and apply KVO even though the ingredient is introduced via stock solution.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: Glucosi 20,0
Aquae purificatae ad 150 ml
M.D.S. Внутрь

cases.title: Tincture must count as liquid and be added late
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Tinctures are often treated like generic solvent or inserted too early with heating.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: T-ra Leonuri 10 ml
Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
M.D.S. Внутрь

cases.title: Aromatic water is not ordinary purified water
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Aromatic waters get merged into plain water identity.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: Aquae Menthae 40 ml
Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
M.D.S. Внутрь

cases.title: Syrup counts as liquid not solids
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Some systems incorrectly treat syrup as sugar mass branch.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: Sirupi simplicis 20 ml
Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
M.D.S. Внутрь

cases.title: Liquid extract counts as liquid and late addition
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Liquid extracts are confused with dry extracts.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: Extracti Crataegi fluidi 10 ml
Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
M.D.S. Внутрь

cases.title: Dry extract must stay in solids branch
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Engine confuses siccum and fluidum.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: Extracti Belladonnae sicci 0,2
Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
M.D.S. Внутрь

cases.title: Menthol blocks simple aqueous true solution
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Weak engines dissolve everything in water.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: Mentholi 0,5
Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
M.D.S. Наружно

cases.title: Menthol in alcohol should choose alcoholic branch
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Branch selector stays in aqueous branch because dosage form is solution.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: Mentholi 0,5
Spiritus aethylici 70% 100 ml
M.D.S. Наружно

cases.title: Camphor in water must be blocked
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Camphor is classically mishandled by simple dissolvers.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: Camphorae 1,0
Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
M.D.S. Наружно

cases.title: Salicylic acid in water must not auto-pass as true aqueous solution
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Engines trust the word solution and ignore solubility gate.

input.recipeText:

Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
M.D.S. Наружно

cases.title: Acidum boricum requires separate dissolution path

input.recipeText:

Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
M.D.S. Для промывания

cases.title: Protargol special dissolution must override generic path
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Generic aqueous path is incorrectly used.

input.recipeText:

Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
M.D.S. Для носа

cases.title: Collargol ophthalmic without sterile support must not be marked complete
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Strict routes get falsely processed by ordinary logic.

input.recipeText:

Aquae purificatae ad 10 ml
M.D.S. Для глаз

cases.title: Argenti nitras requires dark glass, not shake label
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Packaging rules often mix up dark glass and shake behavior.

input.recipeText:

Aquae purificatae ad 10 ml
M.D.S. Наружно

cases.title: Hydrogen peroxide route-specific external policy

input.recipeText:

D.S. Наружно

cases.title: Alcoholic solution must not include routine heating
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Templates insert heating generically for dissolution.

input.recipeText:

Spiritus aethylici 70% 100 ml
M.D.S. Наружно

cases.title: Volatile solvent should prefer late addition and tight closure

Mentholi 0,5
M.D.S. Наружно

cases.title: Chloroform should raise volatile and light-protection packaging logic
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Packaging policy is often too generic.

Oleum Vaselini 20 ml

cases.title: Water plus oil without special branch must not be called true solution

Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml

Spiritus aethylici 70% 10 ml
D.S. Капли в нос

cases.title: Ophthalmic route requires sterility and isotonicity awareness

Aquae purificatae ad 10 ml
D.S. Для глаз

cases.title: Injection route must be blocked by normal solution engine
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Ordinary solution logic leaks into parenteral paths.

input.recipeText:
Rp.: Natrii chloridi 0,9
Aquae pro injectionibus ad 100 ml
D.S. Для инъекций

cases.title: Inhalation route must not reuse oral solution templates
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Engines reuse labels and oral wording for inhalation.

input.recipeText:

Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
D.S. Для ингаляций

cases.title: Dose parser tablespoon variant

input.recipeText:

Aquae purificatae ad 150 ml
D.S. По 1 стол. л. 3 р/д

Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
D.S. По 1 ч. л. 4 раза в день

input.recipeText:

Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml
D.S. По 10 мл 3 раза в день

input.recipeText:

Aquae purificatae ad 150 ml
D.S. 1 tablespoon three times daily

cases.title: Potent substance with vague signa must keep unresolved warning

cases.title: Name and metadata conflict must raise ingredient_form_conflict

Aquae purificatae ad 100 ml

cases.title: Pepsinum style malformed metadata row should not crash engine
cases.whyBreaksEngines: Reference anomalies can poison parsing and resolution.
